activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Boxes & Labels Olsfors AB Buagärde 39
517 95, Olsfors
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Boxes & Labels Olsfors AB Buagärde 39
517 95 OLSFORS
SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Boxes & Labels Olsfors AB' from Sweden in the certificate matches exactly the invoice issuer name and address with allowed normalizations (case, spacing, corporate form). The company name is explicitly found in the invoice's Shipper Address block on invoice page 1. Country 'Sweden' matches after normalization. No conflicts detected. Rule 4.1.0 applied to confirm consignor presence anywhere in invoice.

consignee.motivation: Consignee named 'Transalkim Ulus. Nak ve Tic LTD' in the certificate matches the invoice 'Invoicing Address' with allowed normalizations of spelling variants, punctuation, and casing. Address and country 'Türkiye'/'Turkey' confirm match. The consignee is found in the invoice invoicing address block on page 1. No conflicting parties detected.

goods_description.certificate_value:
1 pallet 693 kg
Glue labels
Ribbons
See attached invoice 50060 dated 2026-02-20
goods_description.invoice_value:
E16236 Tracy KP212 glue label ny 2025 85x48 mm
510897 Tracy KP296 glue label 40x25mm
513434 Tracy KP208o308 glue label 35x70 mm
510896 Tracy INTGlue glue label 42x32 mm
128-600-11201-20 Thermal Transfer Ribbon, black 128mmx600m
89-600-11201-20 Thermal Transfer Ribbon, black 89mmx600m
goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses general goods description referencing attached invoice '50060 dated 2026-02-20' which exactly matches the invoice number and date, triggering rule 4.3.5 and allowing acceptance of general description. Direct product description and article numbers from certificate do not match invoice line descriptions exactly, so direct text match per 4.3.2 fails. Therefore, status is MANUAL_REVIEW.

quantity.invoice_value:
Box paperlabels: 44
Box ribbons: 14
Tot. KG/gross: 693,00
quantity.motivation: Quantity values of 44 boxes and 14 boxes in certificate match exactly the 'Box paperlabels' and 'Box ribbons' amounts on invoice. Gross weight 693 kg in certificate matches 'Tot. KG/gross: 693,00' on invoice with tolerated normalization of decimal notation. No conflicts or missing values. Verified per rule 4.4.3.

origin.motivation: Certificate declares origin as 'European Community' which is normalized to 'European Union' and accepted as verified by invoice indicating origin as 'SE' (Sweden), an EU member state. The origin appears explicitly in the invoice under column 'CoO' per each product line. No conflicting origins found. China-Hong Kong rule (4.6) not triggered differently here. Verified under rule 4.5.4.1 and 4.6.

manual_review_triggers: 4.3 Goods description requires manual review due to general description usage with invoice reference and mismatch in exact article text comparison
overall_assessment.decision_summary: All major control points except goods description verify as MATCH. Goods description verification falls under manual review due to general description usage referencing the invoice rather than exact text match.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Varubeskrivningen i certifikatet är generell och hänvisar till faktura 50060, vilket kräver manuell granskning. Övriga uppgifter för avsändare, mottagare, kvantitet och ursprung stämmer väl mellan certifikat och faktura.
